stemHtml: A pilot is preparing for a flight in Spain during summer, and observes an intense small-scale low-pressure system on the surface analysis chart situated along their route. Which of the following will be associated with this?

options.a: Clear sky, good visibility and turbulence.
options.b: Light winds, fog, haze and turbulence.
options.d: Turbulence, clear sky and a surface inversion.
